Name: iUdpReceiveBufferSize
Description: Size of a socket's receive buffer.

Name: iUdpSendBufferSize
Description: Size of a socket's send buffer.

Name: bHttpServerQueries
Description: Returns xml by default. Can be overridden using wse_get_server_info script.

Name: bBreakWarbandCompatibility
Description: Changes the network protocol for enable some advanced WSE features like composite network messages and more skins in multiplayer.

Name: bOGPServer
Description: Open game protocol for quering server info.

Name: bRCONServer
Description: Source rcon protocol for remote console commands.

Name: iNumPlayersLimit
Description: Different values on client and server break network compatibility (different size of number in bits). So put this value in the settings of your module and not only to server. Range: 2-1000. Operation: get_max_players.

Name: iMultiplayerEventForAnnounce
Description: Used for announce console command and other WSE2 server notifications since Warband doesn't have a hardcoded event for that purpose. 111 for Native and VC, 105 for NW. For other modules check header_common.py and search multiplayer_event_show_server_message or similar.

Name: bServerLockFov
Description: Used server-side for lock fov for all WSE2 players to default 75.

Name: bFastDL
Description: Quick download of server's custom maps from external storage.
